details.heading: Ships in product packaging
details.content: This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. item_specifications.special_feature: Collapsible, Easy to Use, Hard Case, Heavy Duty, Portable

about_item: Easy to Assemble: The one-piece folding dog box furniture eliminates the need for complex assembly. You can create a comfortable haven for your pet set up and fold down the crate in seconds with no tools required. Enjoy a wonderful life with your furry good friend!

Space-Saving & Easy Mobility: This collapsible dog crate features a innovative foldable design, allowing it to be stored flat when not in use. Equipped with two smooth-rolling wheels and sturdy handles on both sides, this pet crate offers effortless mobility. Move your dog cage around the house or during travel with minimal effort

Safe & Reliable: Gardner Pet pet kennel Features squeeze-latch locks on the door for quick and secure closure. allowing your furry friends to stay safely inside while also being friendly to the fingers of pet guardians. These locks are easy for owners to operate but prevent clever dogs from opening them.Our curved corners help prevent squeezing and the sinking of the chin and claws, and the rounded corners eliminate sharp edges

Long-lasting Dog House: Composed of high-quality PE and strong metal wire, the indoor dog house is both functional and aesthetically pleasing for modern homes, providing your pet with a long-lasting, stable and safe resting place
Multi-functional Dog Cage furniture: Modern style, suitable for any home decoration, whether as a cozy indoor dog house, a travel crate for road trips, or a temporary containment space outdoors

Quality & Care: Gardner Pet is committed to creating meticulously designed pet products, prioritizing safety, comfort and convenience. Our mission is to improve the lives of pets and their owners through high-quality, innovative solutions that stand the test of time

certified_by.name: Global Recycled Standard
certified_by.description: Global Recycled Standard (GRS) certified products contain recycled content that has been independently verified at each stage of the supply chain, from the source to the final product and meet social, environmental, and chemical requirements. The purchase of Global Recycled Standard (GRS) certified products supports the use of recycled content in the supply chain. A product must contain at least 50% certified GRS material to qualify for inclusion in Climate Pledge Friendly.

Easy to set up & safe for the puppy.

authors_reviews.title: Great design and easy to use!
authors_reviews.text: What a great invention! These are very easy to set up and collapse. I like that they are self contained without any bags or straps to keep track of. My only wish is that there was an additional size in between the small and the large. My whippets fit, but they could use an extra inch all around for comfort. Love the design and quality. They weigh less than the wire crates of the same size.
authors_reviews.author: Vicki

authors_reviews.title: Great cage with easy setup
authors_reviews.text: Very solid? Easy to set up from place to place. Even the puppy seems to really like it. 😊
authors_reviews.author: Cliff Blizzard

authors_reviews.title: Great quality!
authors_reviews.text: Awesome crate for my dog. Love that it collapses and I can take it anywhere. Great quality and very speedy shipping.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Great quality, be careful of measurements
authors_reviews.text: I bought this collapible crate for my Australian Shepherd as an option to take to dog shows with us. The quality of the crate is awesome. Assembly was easy and it was sturdy enough. However the deminsions are misleading. I ended up having to return the crate because my dog couldn't stand or sit up at all and it wasn't easy for him toturn around in it. He measures the same size as the pictured Border Collie? But the dimensions are the outside deminsions of the crate. The inside measures smaller. I hope some vendor put there comes out with a solid (not soft-sided)collapible crate measuring 39" L x 28" H as that would be a perfect fit for my Aussie's measurements + the 2-4" recommended for crates.
authors_reviews.author: Kathryn Smith

authors_reviews.title: Sturdy, Easy to Assemble
authors_reviews.text: I love this crate. It was easy to put together (and I am not handy) and is sturdy. It doesn’t make a lot of noise when my pup comes into contact with it. I wish it came in one size smaller for my other smaller puppy. Perfect fit for my 4 month old, 12 lb cavapoo to grow into. I bought a medium pad from KindTails and put it in there and it’s a perfect fit. I don’t use it for travel, but it seems to me that it’ll collapse easily since it popped together so easily when assembled.
authors_reviews.author: GatorB8t

authors_reviews.title: Wonderful Crate
authors_reviews.text: Fantastic popup crate. We have loved it for our new puppy. Our house is small and folding down will help a lot when it comes time to put it away. The 28" size has been great for our large breed puppy (Bernese Mtn Dog) and it should last him a couple of months before he needs an upgrade.
authors_reviews.author: Sage and Stone Homestead

authors_reviews.title: Love this crate for class
authors_reviews.text: Love this crate! Easy to fold up and very portable. Bought this as a portable option for dog shows and class, and absolutely love it.
authors_reviews.author: Cat Hugger in MI

authors_reviews.title: Stylish Dog Crate
authors_reviews.text: Easy to set up & safe for the puppy.
authors_reviews.author: Anita M Viehmann

other_countries_reviews.title: Bigger than expected
other_countries_reviews.text: Houseworthy good looking cage. sturdy and well made.Would help if the cage could have a back opening to straighten the bedding as this cage is quite long. however very pleased and impressed by this item and the dog is very happy to be in it when necessary;
other_countries_reviews.author: mike W
